task_completion.description: Set the project Status Date to February 15, 2000
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Project Information' dialog box is visible with the 'Status Date' field set to February 15, 2000 (or 2/15/00).

task_completion.description: Mark 'Cure piers and foundations' as 100% complete
task_completion.visual_evidence: Row 42 ('Cure piers and foundations') shows '100%' in the '% Complete' column, has a checkmark in the indicator column, or its Gantt bar shows full completion.

task_completion.description: Reduce the duration of 'Strip column piers and foundation forms' to 3 days
task_completion.visual_evidence: Row 44 ('Strip column piers and foundation forms') shows '3 days' or '3d' in the Duration column.

task_completion.description: Set a 'Start No Earlier Than' constraint of March 1, 2000 on 'Erect steel columns...'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Task Information dialog for row 48 ('Erect steel columns, beams and joist - 1st and 2nd floors') shows the Advanced tab with Constraint Type 'Start No Earlier Than' and Date 'March 1, 2000', or a constraint icon is visible in the indicator column for row 48.

task_completion.description: Insert a 0-day milestone with predecessor and resource assignment
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new row (likely row 47) is named 'Foundation Remediation Inspection' with a Duration of '0 days' (or milestone icon). Its Predecessor column shows '46' and its Resource Names column shows 'G.C. Project Management'.
The 'Save Baseline' dialog box is open and being confirmed, or baseline bars (usually a second bar under the main task bar) are visible in the Gantt chart.

task_completion.description: Save the project as schedule_recovery.xml in the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog is visible showing the file name 'schedule_recovery.xml' and the directory path '/home/ga/Projects/output/'.

integrity.description: Agent used the ProjectLibre GUI to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ProjectLibre application interface (menus, dialogs, spreadsheet view) rather than a terminal or text editor modifying the XML directly.

integrity.description: Agent actually performed the steps rather than opening a pre-made file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the progression of changes being made (e.g., typing in cells, opening dialogs, clicking buttons) rather than just a final state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Task 42 is 'Cure piers and foundations' (must be 100% complete). Task 44 is 'Strip column piers and foundation forms' (must be 3 days duration). Task 48 is 'Erect steel columns, beams and joist - 1st and 2nd floors' (must have 'Start No Earlier Than' constraint on Mar 1, 2000). Task 46 is 'Prepare and pour concrete floor in elevator pit'. The new milestone 'Foundation Remediation Inspection' (0 days) must be inserted immediately after Task 46, with predecessor 46 and resource 'G.C. Project Management'. Status date must be Feb 15, 2000. Baseline must be saved. Output file: /home/ga/Projects/output/schedule_recovery.xml.
